description: image_read response for the obituary page-scan ARK (3:1:3Q9M-C95G-HQZ6-W) — the CORRECT tool for a document-image ARK. The `ark` predicate substring-matches the distinctive ARK id, so it matches whether the skill passes the bare 3:1: ARK or the canonical ark:/61903/3:1:... form (both accepted by image_read). This is the recovery target: after record_read rejects the image ARK (see record-read-image-ark-rejected), the correct next step is image_read on that same ARK. NOTE: the harness mock serves this as JSON text, not a rendered image, so it exercises tool-routing (was the ARK handed to image_read / the image-reader subagent?), not visual transcription.
